case_title: ERWIN R BARRIOS VS. ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $849.91 FILED BY BARRIOS, ERWIN R AS TO DEFENDANT ACE PARKING MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
